channel.title: BoxBoxF1Fantasy updates
channel.description: Latest F1 Fantasy predictions, race picks, tools and guides from BoxBoxF1Fantasy.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Driver Predictions 2026
item.description: Current F1 Fantasy driver projections for Belgian Grand Prix: expected points, price, value and predicted finishing position.

item.description: Current F1 Fantasy constructor projections for Belgian Grand Prix: expected points, price, value, pit-stop points and risk.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Points & Price Tracker 2026
item.description: Recorded 2026 F1 Fantasy driver and constructor points, current prices, season price movement, last-three form and average value.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Guides (2026)
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy 2026 guides: how scoring works, how to win, chips explained, drivers vs constructors, and a beginner's how-to-play walkthrough.

item.title: How F1 Fantasy Scoring Works (2026)
item.description: F1 Fantasy 2026 scoring explained: qualifying, race and sprint points, overtakes, bonuses, DNF penalties, constructors and pit stops.

item.title: How to Win F1 Fantasy: Strategy Guide (2026)
item.description: Six F1 Fantasy strategies for 2026: find value, grow budget, plan transfers, time chips, use constructors well and captain reliable upside.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Chips Explained (2026)
item.description: All six F1 Fantasy 2026 chips explained — Limitless, 3x Boost, Wild Card, No Negative, Autopilot and Final Fix — with the best time to use each.

item.title: Drivers vs Constructors in F1 Fantasy
item.description: Should you spend more on F1 Fantasy drivers or constructors? Compare driver upside with two-car scoring, pit stops and constructor bonuses.

item.title: F1 Fantasy for Beginners: How to Play (2026)
item.description: New to F1 Fantasy? A simple 2026 beginner's guide: budget, picking your 5 drivers and 2 constructors, transfers, chips, deadlines and how scoring works.

item.title: Free F1 Fantasy Tools
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy tools: a lineup optimizer, transfer planner, budget builder and points projections, all powered by machine-learning predictions.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Predictions 2026
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy 2026 predictions: projected driver and constructor points, confidence ranges, value ratings, race picks and optimizer tools.

item.title: Best F1 Fantasy Team 2026
item.description: Find the best F1 Fantasy team for the current race weekend with free driver and constructor projections, budget checks, chips, value ratings and a lineup optimizer.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Captain Picks 2026
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy captain and boost pick advice for 2026: compare projected driver points, downside risk, confidence ranges and 3x Boost candidates.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Deadline 2026: Lock Times & Race Calendar
item.description: F1 Fantasy 2026 deadline tracker: see each race lock time, sprint-weekend lock rule, next deadline and the full season deadline table.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Value Picks This Week
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy value picks for the current race weekend: best points-per-million drivers, budget picks and constructor value based on live projections.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Price Changes: Rise & Fall Watchlist
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy price-change watchlist for 2026: see drivers and constructors under price-rise or price-drop pressure based on current projections and value signals.

item.title: F1 Fantasy DNF Risk & Reliability 2026
item.description: Current F1 Fantasy DNF risk for every driver and constructor, with reliability bands, expected points and Monte Carlo downside floors.

item.title: Free F1 Fantasy Team Optimizer 2026
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy optimizer checking 1.4 million legal teams within your budget using ML projections, chips, locks, exclusions and four strategies.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Team Compare & Score Calculator
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy team compare tool: enter up to three candidate teams and compare budget, projected points, confidence range, price movement and downside risk.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Transfer Planner & Advisor
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy transfer tools: find your best one or two swaps this week, or plan transfers and chips across 2-5 upcoming rounds with a multi-week planner.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Budget Builder
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy budget builder: find the picks most likely to rise in price so your team value compounds, leaving more to spend on stars later in the season.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Points Calculator & Predictions
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy points calculator with current driver and constructor projections, qualifying and race breakdowns, overtakes and bonuses.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Prediction Accuracy 2026
item.description: Public BoxBoxF1Fantasy track record across 9 completed rounds: driver points MAE 12.0, constructor points MAE 18.7, and 90% CI coverage 79%.

item.title: BoxBoxF1Fantasy Changelog 2026
item.description: Public release notes for BoxBoxF1Fantasy model updates, scoring fixes, data-quality improvements and feature releases. Latest: Faster first load and better search discovery.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Videos 2026
item.description: Latest BoxBoxF1Fantasy YouTube videos for F1 Fantasy race-week drafts, deadline strategy, top picks and data-backed team decisions. Latest: The Best F1 Fantasy Team for the Belgian Grand Prix - 2026 F1 Fantasy Drafts, Data, Tips & Strategy.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Articles 2026
item.description: Race previews, recaps, F1 Fantasy strategy notes and longer-form BoxBoxF1Fantasy analysis.

item.title: Belgian GP F1 Fantasy: Why Max Leads
item.description: Why does Max Verstappen lead BoxBox's Belgian GP F1 Fantasy forecast after scoring -3 points at Silverstone? The short answer is upside, not certainty. This is a dated pre-practice briefing based on the model run...

item.title: Round 3 — Japanese GP Recap & Miami Preview
item.description: Japan Delivered the Goods Who’d have thought that McLaren would be on the podium after a dismal first two races of the season? And we have a new championship leader. Kimi Antonelli leads over George Russell by 9...

item.title: Round 3 — Japanese Grand Prix Preview
item.description: Japanese Grand Prix Preview We are hot off a sprint weekend in China and we head into the Japanese Grand Prix. Some teams, including Aston Martin with their Honda power-unit, are bringing upgrades to table in hopes of...

item.title: Round 2 — Chinese Grand Prix Recap
item.description: Shanghai Sprint Weekend Round 2 took the paddock to the Shanghai International Circuit for the first sprint weekend of the season. The sprint format added an extra layer of complexity for both teams and fantasy...

item.title: Round 1 — Australian Grand Prix Recap
item.description: Season Opener in Melbourne The 2026 Formula 1 season kicked off under the lights of Albert Park with a dramatically reshuffled grid under the new technical regulations. With wider cars, new aero rules, and 11 teams on...

item.title: BoxBoxF1Fantasy Public Data 2026
item.description: Public JSON endpoint index for BoxBoxF1Fantasy predictions, season summary, driver history, track data, weather, articles, videos and changelog.
